alerts.title: PULSE — Leagues: CTR collapsed 21.3% vs 7d avg
alerts.meta: CTR now 0.49% vs 0.62% baseline. Threshold: >15% drop. Frequency at 3.9 — audience saturated.

alerts.title: PULSE — Leagues: CPL spiked +31.2% vs 7d avg
alerts.meta: CPL rose from $124.96 to $164.00. Threshold: >20% spike. Immediate budget review required.

alerts.title: BRAND GAUGE — Leagues: CTR down 17.8% vs 7d avg
alerts.meta: CTR now 0.41% vs 0.50% baseline. Co-occurring with freq 3.7 — creative fatigue confirmed.

alerts.title: BRAND GAUGE — Leagues: CPL spiked +22.5% vs 7d avg
alerts.meta: CPL rose from $111.84 to $137.00. Threshold: >20% spike.

alerts.title: PULSE — Leagues: Frequency at 3.9 (threshold 3.5)
alerts.meta: Same audience seeing ads ~4× in 7 days. Creative rotation and audience expansion urgent.

alerts.title: BRAND GAUGE — Leagues: Frequency at 3.7 (threshold 3.5)
alerts.meta: Frequency above warning threshold. Audience overlap with PULSE campaign likely amplifying fatigue.

opportunities.title: JORDY AI — Sports Teams outperforming: CPL $90.38, CTR 0.81%
opportunities.meta: CPL is 28% below account average ($126.10). CTR up +11.2% WoW. Scale budget 20-30% immediately.

opportunities.title: AXIS — Broadcasters: Consistent positive CTR trend (+4.1% WoW)
opportunities.meta: CPL improving (-8.3% WoW) at $110.25. Audience frequency healthy at 2.1. Room to increase bids and reach.

opportunities.title: Leagues & Associations segment exhausted across two products
opportunities.meta: Both PULSE and BRAND GAUGE campaigns targeting overlapping Leagues audience. Consolidate or split by job function to reduce internal frequency inflation.
